title: Test Functional Performance and Security Risk
guidance: QA should cover correctness performance and security on important API and workflow paths
do: Build tests around auth validation error handling and regression risk
dont: Do not reduce QA to a happy-path smoke check for critical changes

title: Evidence-Based Pass Fail
guidance: QA results need reproducible evidence with clear pass fail status per acceptance criterion
do: Attach outputs repro steps or observations to each verdict
dont: Do not mark a change as passed without evidence

title: Exercise Edge Cases and Regression Paths
guidance: Risk-focused QA should probe failure modes edge cases and adjacent regressions
do: Test invalid input boundary conditions and common regression paths
dont: Do not stop after the first passing scenario
